'''For'ali''' was an elderly [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] scholar during the reign of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. A tan-skinned Twi'lek from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], For'ali was an expert in non-verbal communication, and was an acquaintance of [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. He was one of the three scholars who could understand [[Tahu'ip]] and help decode the mystery of the [[Lorrd Artifact|Tassels]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
